sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44672" key="eu)pa/laistros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπάλαιστρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n44672.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">skilful in contest</tr_>, metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ κατὰ τὰς εἰρωνείας εὐ</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
